reviews.review_description: Reactour offers a unique opportunity to explore two nuclear power plants in the Czech Republic through stunning 360° video walkthroughs. The app is straightforward and easy to use, allowing you to dive right into exploring the incredible views inside and outside the plants. The visuals are immersive, and the level of detail makes the experience both educational and captivating. It's perfect for anyone curious about nuclear energy or industrial architecture. A must-download for science and tech enthusiasts alike!
